data.title: Specialty steel industry in North America supports Trump Administration's efforts on global steel excess capacity. USTR Greer discusses the actions at GFSEC meeting in South Africa.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer addressed the Global Forum on Steel Excess Capacity in Gqeberha, South Africa via virtual remarks. Greer emphasized the efforts made by the previous administration to tackle issues related to steel excess capacity. The specifics of the actions taken were not provided in the rephrased content.

data.title: Gary L. Sugarman joins CIBL as Board of Directors member. He is also director at LICT Corporation and founder of private equity fund Richfield Associates FL, Inc.
data.description: In Reno, Nevada, CIBL, Inc., known as CIBL and trading as CIBY on the OTC Pink® platform, is pleased to share that Gary L. Sugarman has been appointed as a director. Sugarman, who is currently a board member at LICT Corporation, a telecom firm, was previously the head of Richfield Associates FL, Inc., a private equity fund he established in 1993, with a focus on the telecom and technology sectors. He served in this capacity until December 2023. Additionally, Sugarman acts as an advisor for Morrison and Co., an infrastructure fund.

data.title: Truck Month at Chris Auffenberg Dealerships offers exclusive Chevrolet deals in FARMINGTON, Mo, starting Oct. 10, 2025.
data.description: Join the festivities during Truck Month at Chris Auffenberg Dealerships in FARMINGTON, Mo., starting October 10, 2025. Special Chevrolet offers are up for grabs, making it the ideal moment for drivers to experience the thrill of a new truck. Act now as these exclusive deals will only be available for a limited time.

data.title: Ponant partners with WHOI for ocean research, expeditions, and tech testing. 3-year collaboration announced in NYC. #PonantWHOI
data.description: In a recently announced collaboration, PONANT EXPLORATIONS GROUP and an unnamed partner will join forces for a three-year project focused on ocean research and conservation. The collaboration will involve scientific expeditions, onboard educational programs, and the testing of advanced ocean research technology. This initiative, set to begin on Oct. 10, 2025, underscores the mutual commitment to advancing knowledge of the oceans and safeguarding marine environments. Stay tuned for further updates on this exciting venture.

data.title: Stolt-Nielsen Limited issued NOK 1.5 billion senior unsecured bonds with 225 bps coupon, highly oversubscribed.
data.description: In London on October 8, 2025, Stolt-Nielsen Limited (Oslo Børs: SNI) revealed the completion of a new senior unsecured bond offering totaling NOK 1.5 billion, set to mature on October 22, 2030. This bond features a coupon rate of 3 months NIBOR + 225 basis points per annum, with interest payments disbursed quarterly. The issuance garnered substantial attention from investors, resulting in oversubscription.

data.title: BitMine Stock (BMNR) surges as crypto market gains, Ethereum prices rise. BitMine owns 2% of total ETH token supply.
data.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies Inc (NYSE: BMNR) saw a rise in its shares on Monday fueled by the overall growth in the cryptocurrency market, particularly Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) prices. BitMine shared an update on its Ethereum holdings, revealing that it now owns more than 2% of the total ETH token supply. Various crypto-related stocks, including BitMine, experienced gains as crypto prices surged. Bitcoin recorded a 1.79% increase over a 24-hour period, trading near its peak, while Ethereum showed a 3.6% rise, reaching around $4,700. The appreciation in crypto values is positively impacting stocks connected to the crypto market, benefiting from the surge in the underlying asset values. BitMine aims to achieve the "alchemy of 5%" as part of its strategic pursuits.

data.title: Trump's tariffs hinder Fed's rate cuts, raising concerns of prolonged inflation. Inflation may not hit 2% until 2027.
data.description: Trade tariffs imposed by President Donald Trump are impacting the outlook for growth and inflation, posing challenges for the Federal Reserve's interest rate cuts. Despite a recent 25-basis-point cut, concerns remain over inflation reaching the 2% target due to price pressures driven by tariffs. The Fed's internal discussions highlight the prolonged impact of current trade policies on inflation, with most members expressing agreement on continued inflation uptick potentially lasting through next year. Latest economic projections by the Fed indicate inflation hitting the 2% target as late as 2027, a year later than previously anticipated, signaling the persistent nature of existing price pressures. This delay underscores the likelihood of inflation struggling to meet targets until late 2027.

data.title: Strathcona ends MEG Energy Corp. take-over bid, proposes $10/share distribution, and schedules shareholder meeting.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, Strathcona Resources Ltd. revealed the conclusion of its take-over bid for MEG Energy Corp. It also disclosed plans for a shareholders' meeting to endorse a special distribution amounting to $10.00 per share. Additionally, the company announced...

data.title: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals grants 78,975 stock options and 54,475 RSU awards to 20 new employees on Oct 10, 2025.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRNX) revealed that the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors had approved the issuance of non-qualified stock options for 78,975 shares of common stock and 54,475 restricted stock units (RSUs) to 20 new non-executive employees. These awards were granted under the Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc. 2021 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan (2021 Inducement Plan) and were deemed significant inducements for the new employees joining Crinetics. This action aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Moxie Health Group organizes first Moxiethon Hackathon in Honduras, bringing students together to innovate AI-driven healthcare solutions.
data.description: In San Pedro Sula, Honduras, Moxie Health recently organized the inaugural MoxieThon Hackathon. The event brought together students to collaborate on creating healthcare innovations powered by artificial intelligence (AI) using Moxie-Link technology.

data.title: KB Home opens The Traditions in Teravalis Master Planned Community in Buckeye, Arizona. Located between White Tank and Belmont Mountains.
data.description: KB Home, a leading U.S. homebuilder (NYSE: KBH), unveiled The Traditions neighborhood in the Teravalis community in Buckeye, Arizona. Positioned amidst the White Tank and Belmont Mountains, the new master plan offers residents a perfect mix of small-town charm and outdoor pursuits. The growing city of Buckeye is becoming a desirable location for many, with its picturesque mountain vistas. The Traditions is part of the highly anticipated Teravalis development, showcasing KB Home's commitment to quality and innovation in housing.

data.title: XKIG strengthens position by acquiring Thomas Contracting, a leader in critical infrastructure services.
data.description: XKIG, a prominent player in critical infrastructure services for the power and gas utility sectors, revealed the acquisition of Thomas Contracting, a well-established company based in the Southeast. The acquisition, announced on Oct. 10, 2025, in Norfolk, VA, is set to bolster Xylem Tree Experts' position in the region. This move is strategic in expanding XKIG's market presence and enhancing its capabilities in the Southeast. With this acquisition, XKIG aims to further solidify its standing in the industry and capitalize on Thomas Contracting's expertise. The transaction signifies a significant milestone for XKIG, marking a notable development in its operations and signaling growth opportunities.

data.title: Pembina Pipeline closes $225M subordinated note offering, redeems Series 9 shares, with 5.95% Fixed-to-Fixed Rate Subordinated Notes.
data.description: Pembina Pipeline Corporation has successfully completed an offering of $225 million in 5.95% Fixed-to-Fixed Rate Subordinated Notes, Series 2, due June 6, 2055. The offering was closed with a syndicate of underwriters, including CIBC Capital Markets, BMO Capital Markets, and Scotiabank. The Series 2 Notes are part of Pembina's financial strategy for growth and investment. The company's stock is listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: PPL) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: PBA).

data.title: SEC's efforts aim to influence level of crypto freedom post-Trump. Could new US admin reverse Atkins' work quickly? Experts discuss.
data.description: Legal and regulatory experts are contemplating the possibility of a future US presidential administration undoing all of Paul Atkins' work in just a few days. The discussion comes amid speculations about the potential impact of such actions. Experts are weighing the consequences and the extent to which regulatory changes could be reversed. The implications of this scenario are being analyzed in the context of the regulatory landscape, with focus on past decisions and their potential vulnerability to being overturned swiftly. This development raises important questions about the long-term stability and impact of regulatory decisions within the US government.
M7.2 Earthquake - Drake Passage - reports

data.title: Fulcrum Therapeutics granted stock options to new employees under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) on Oct 10, 2025.
data.description: Fulcrum Therapeutics, Inc., based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, disclosed on October 10, 2025, that they have provided non-statutory stock options to fresh recruits. The clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, listed as FULC on Nasdaq, focuses on creating small molecules for patients with rare genetic diseases. These stock options allow employees to purchase company common stock, presented under the 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan. This move aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) and aims to attract new talent by offering them a stake in the company's future.

data.title: byNordic Acquisition Corp extends business combination deadline with $17,470, up to 12 one-month extensions allowed.
data.description: A special purpose acquisition company, byNordic Acquisition Corporation (BYNO), has extended the deadline for completing a business combination by depositing $17,470 into its trust account. The extension grants an additional month, from October 12, 2025, to November 12, 2025, marking the third out of a possible twelve one-month extensions allowed under the company's Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation. This amendment permits BYNO's board of directors to lengthen the termination date by one month each time, without requiring another stockholder vote, up until August 12, 2026, or the execution of the initial business combination.

data.title: HBT Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: HBT) will announce Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 20, 2025, before the market opens. Visit https://ir.hbtfinancial.com.
data.description: HBT Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: HBT) based in Bloomington, Illinois, is set to release its third quarter 2025 financial results on Monday, October 20, 2025. As the holding company for Heartland Bank and Trust Company, HBT Financial will disclose its performance before the market opens on that day. Interested parties can access the press release and an investor presentation detailing the third quarter financial results on the Company’s investor relations website at https://ir.hbtfinancial.com. Keep an eye out for key numbers and insights about the Company's financial standing.

data.title: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE: IR) to release Q3 2025 earnings on Oct. 30 after market close. Mission-critical solutions provider.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, Ingersoll Rand Inc., a leading global company offering essential flow creation, life science, and industrial solutions, announced that it will release its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on Thursday, October 30, 2025, after the market closes. Ingersoll Rand Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol IR. This news was shared from Davidson, North Carolina.

data.title: Cerence Inc. grants 63,397 restricted stock units to Raja Bose as Vice President under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: Cerence Inc. (CRNC), based in Burlington, Mass., announced the appointment of Raja Bose as Vice President of Global Product Management, starting on October 8, 2025. In relation to this appointment, Mr. Bose was granted 63,397 time-based restricted stock units. These units are set to vest in three equal parts on each of the first three anniversaries of the grant date, contingent upon Mr. Bose's continuous service with the company until the vesting date. The allocation of these restricted stock units was made as an incentive for Mr. Bose to join Cerence Inc. under Rule 5635(c)(4) of the Nasdaq Listing Rules.
